extortion.description: [AI generated] Carducci is an esteemed fashion brand hailing from Cape Town, South Africa. Founded in 1978, it specializes in sophisticated menswear, particularly business and casual wear, tailored suits, accessories, and footwear. The brand is renowned for its fine craftsmanship, refined textiles, and keen attention to detail. Carducci is part of the Seardel Group of Companies.
